name: SEAFARER EXPLORATION CORP
summary: Seafarer Exploration Corp. is a Florida-based company focused on rescue archaeology, exploration, recovery, and conservation of historic shipwrecks. The company conducts archival research, translates historical documents, and develops proprietary technology including the SeaSearcher, a metal discriminator that differentiates between metals including gold and silver. It has not generated meaningful revenue since inception and relies on external financing to fund operations.
